entity.summary: Berachain decentralized exchange protocol represented in major DeFi data and integration codebases. HEI classifies BurrBear as active based on current ecosystem integration evidence and a maintained first-party contract-address package.
entity.notes: The research cluster did not recover a sufficiently reliable public launch marker or canonical website domain, so launch_date and original URL fields remain null rather than being guessed.

evidence.title: BurrBear protocol profile and DEX activity
evidence.notes: Protocol registry source identifies BurrBear as a Berachain DEX and provides the active candidate signal used for review.

evidence.title: BurrBear contract address package
evidence.notes: First-party development repository publishes BurrBear contract-address package metadata and chain deployment address data.
